overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character walking through a hilly San Francisco residential neighborhood at night. The character navigates brick pathways, asphalt intersections, and concrete sidewalks while passing Victorian-style houses, parked cars, and occasional pedestrians under warm street lighting, with the Transamerica Pyramid visible in the distant skyline.

events.description: transitioning from brick plaza onto asphalt street surface

agents.ego_description: walking down a curved brick path toward the street intersection, descending the hill

segments.scene_description: The character begins on a wide brick-paved plaza with curved garden beds on the right, surrounded by Victorian houses. The night scene is illuminated by warm street lamps as the character walks downhill toward a street intersection, transitioning from brick to asphalt surface.

stepping onto concrete sidewalk after crossing the asphalt street

agents.ego_description: crossing the asphalt intersection and stepping onto the opposite sidewalk, continuing downhill

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the asphalt street intersection as a white sedan passes by, then steps onto the concrete sidewalk. The scene shifts from the open plaza to a more enclosed street environment with parked cars and pedestrians visible near the buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep residential sidewalk with overhead power lines

agents.ego_description: walking steadily downhill along the sidewalk, passing rows of parked vehicles and Victorian houses

segments.scene_description: The character continues descending the steep residential sidewalk, flanked by Victorian houses and parked cars. Overhead power lines crisscross the sky, and the distant Transamerica Pyramid becomes visible in the background against the night sky.

events.description: crossing streetcar tracks embedded in the road surface
character slows and approaches a pedestrian standing on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection with tracks, then approaching and passing a pedestrian on the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing on the sidewalk who the character approaches and walks past

entered.detail: metal streetcar rails embedded in the asphalt road surface
public waste bins on the sidewalk near the corner

segments.scene_description: The character crosses an intersection featuring embedded streetcar tracks, then approaches a pedestrian standing on the sidewalk. The scene continues down the steep hill with Victorian houses on both sides and the distant skyline shifting to the left as the character progresses.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous descent from an open residential plaza down a steep San Francisco hillside toward the distant city skyline. It begins on a wide brick-paved plaza flanked by curved garden beds and Victorian houses, moving downhill as the surface transitions from brick to asphalt. As the camera crosses a street intersection and passes a white sedan, the environment shifts from the open plaza to a more enclosed street lined with parked cars and pedestrians. The scene then continues down a steep concrete sidewalk under a web of crisscrossing power lines, revealing the Transamerica Pyramid emerging in the night sky. Finally, the camera crosses embedded streetcar tracks and passes a pedestrian, continuing its descent past Victorian homes as the distant skyline shifts to the left.
